title: Repository Index Contract
summary: Sample standalone entry showing the required shape for repository-level index metadata.
responsibility: Describe the `.index/` contract surface and keep its claims explicitly non-authoritative.

inputs.name: refresh target
inputs.description: Repository or scoped path set chosen for the run.

outputs.name: index contract artifacts
outputs.description: Run, manifest, and entry payloads written under `.index/`.

external_dependencies.name: jsonschema
external_dependencies.notes: Used by the validator for schema enforcement.

public_interfaces.name: validate_repository_index.py
public_interfaces.notes: Primary validation entrypoint for repository index payloads.

review_hints: Check that the entry does not claim verifier authority.
